settings.title: Immunoglobulins (IgG, IgA, IgM)
settings.content: The primary immune proteins in colostrum. They neutralise pathogens, reduce inflammation, and help prime your immune system for optimal response.

settings.title: IGF-1 & Growth Factors
settings.content: Insulin-like Growth Factor-1 supports muscle repair, gut lining restoration, and cellular regeneration — critical for recovery and anti-aging.

settings.title: Lactoferrin
settings.content: A powerful antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory glycoprotein that binds iron, inhibits pathogens, and modulates immune response.

settings.title: Proline-Rich Polypeptides (PRP)
settings.content: Immune-modulating peptides that can both stimulate and down-regulate immune activity, helping maintain immune balance.

settings.heading: Why Sacred Colostrum is Different
settings.subtext: Not all colostrum is created equal. Here is how we compare.

settings.title: How is Sacred Colostrum sourced?
settings.content: We partner with certified farms in New Zealand where cows graze on pesticide-free pasture year-round. Colostrum is only collected after calves have been fully fed.

settings.title: How is it processed?
settings.content: Our gentle low-heat spray-drying process preserves the full spectrum of bioactives — unlike most brands that use ultra-high heat and destroy what makes colostrum work.

settings.title: What does third-party testing mean?
settings.content: Every batch is independently tested by accredited labs for IgG potency, microbial safety, heavy metals, and absence of contaminants before we ship it to you.

settings.title: Is it sustainable?
settings.content: Yes. Our farms operate under New Zealand's strict environmental regulations. We use only surplus colostrum and support regenerative farming practices.

settings.title: What certifications does it have?
settings.content: Our colostrum is produced in a GMP-certified facility and holds NSF certification for sport. It is also Halal and Kosher certified.

settings.question: How do I take Sacred Colostrum?
settings.answer: Mix one scoop (5g) into cold water, a smoothie, or juice daily. For best absorption, take on an empty stomach 20–30 minutes before eating.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Many customers notice improved energy and digestion within 2–4 weeks. We recommend at least 90 days of consistent use for full benefits — which is why we offer our 3-pack.

settings.question: Can I take it if I am lactose intolerant?
settings.answer: Colostrum contains very low levels of lactose compared to regular dairy. Most lactose-sensitive individuals tolerate it well. We recommend starting with a half scoop and consulting your doctor.

settings.question: Is it safe during pregnancy or breastfeeding?
settings.answer: Please consult your healthcare provider before taking any supplement during pregnancy or breastfeeding.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you are not completely satisfied, contact our team for a full refund — no questions asked.

settings.question: Can I pause or cancel a subscription?
settings.answer: Yes, absolutely. You can pause, skip, or cancel your subscription at any time from your account dashboard or by emailing us. No lock-ins, ever.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtext: Still have questions? We are happy to help.
